\doxysection{Green\+FHom3\+DPer Class Reference}
\hypertarget{classGreenFHom3DPer}{}\label{classGreenFHom3DPer}\index{GreenFHom3DPer@{GreenFHom3DPer}}

\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Base class for homogeneous 3D Green\textquotesingle{}s functions with lattice periodicity. 

Stores common periodic‑summation state (Bloch vector {\bfseries{k}}, unit‑cell volume, Ewald/summation controls) and provides a small helper ({\ttfamily Assign}) used in near/far thresholding when deciding which terms to evaluate. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{GreenFHom3DPer_8h_source_l00038}{38}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{GreenFHom3DPer_8h_source}{Green\+FHom3\+DPer.\+h}}.

\hline
